# UI Style Guardrails

- **No Gradients:** Never use linear or radial gradients. Use solid fills only.
- **Typography:** Prioritize 'Inter' or condensed bold fonts. All-caps for headers.
- **Padding:** When in doubt, double the padding. Use an 8px grid.
- **Radius:** Keep border-radius between 0px and 4px. Avoid "pill" shapes.
- **Borders:** Use 1px solid borders with low opacity (0.1) instead of box-shadows.
- **Colors:** Use a high-contrast monochromatic base (Black #000, White #FFF) with one "Heritage" accent color (e.g., Deep Navy or Forest Green).
